questions.question: Explain the concept of rationality in the context of intelligent agents. How does it relate to the goals and actions of the agent?
questions.hint: Define rationality and its importance in intelligent agents

questions.question: Describe the structure of an intelligent agent, highlighting its components and how they interact with each other.
questions.hint: Focus on the key components of an agent, such as perception, reasoning, and action

questions.question: Compare and contrast the nature of the environment in which intelligent agents operate. How do different environmental influences affect agent behavior?
questions.hint: Discuss the various factors that shape the environment and their impact on agents
